message:
feat(websocket): expand WebSocket test coverage with connection lifecycle and frame edge cases (bd-z09e)

Add comprehensive WebSocket integration tests covering connection
lifecycle, frame encoding/decoding edge cases, and error handling:

websocket.rs:
- Minor refinements to WebSocket frame handling internals

websocket tests (258 lines added):
- Connection open/close handshake lifecycle tests
- Binary frame and ping/pong round-trip validation
- Fragmented message reassembly across multiple continuation frames
- Close frame with reason code and UTF-8 payload extraction
- Invalid close code rejection (0999, 1005, 5000 range)
- RSV bit validation (non-zero RSV without negotiated extension)
- Maximum frame size enforcement
- Concurrent send/receive interleaving

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
